smartContracts.title: Smart Contracts That Evolve With the Law.
smartContracts.description: The "immutability Paradox" is solved. Nomyx allows you to upgrade compliance logic and yield structures without migrating assets or changing token addresses.

bullets.title: Zero-Migration Upgrades:
bullets.text: Regulatory changes in 2026? Update the compliance module instantly. No token swaps required.

bullets.title: Modular Security:
bullets.text: Add institutional facets independently. Keep the core asset secure while iterating on features.

bullets.title: Future-Ready:
bullets.text: Built on infrastructure designed to last decades, not just the current crypto cycle.

developers.title: No-Code Simplicity. Full-Code Control.
developers.description: While business teams manage assets via the dashboard, your engineering team maintains full control. Nomyx is built on an API-first architecture, allowing seamless integration with your existing ERP, CRM, and fund administration software.
bullets: GraphQL & REST APIs for all lifecycle management.
